mapper.update: MERGE INTO SITE_VISIT_LOG SVL USING ( SELECT TO_DATE(#{visitDate},'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VISIT_DATE, #{visitorKey} As VISITOR_KEY FROM DUAL) SOURCE ON ( SVL.VISIT_DATE = SOURCE.VISIT_DATE AND SVL.VISITOR_KEY = SOURCE.VISITOR_KEY) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET SVL.SESSION_ID = #{sessionId}, SVL.LAST_VISITED_AT = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{lastVisitedAt},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), SVL.UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT( VISIT_ID, VISIT_DATE, VISIT_TYPE, VISIT_KEY, MEMBER_ID, SESSION_ID, IP_ADDRESS, USER_AGENT, VISITED_URL, FIRST_VISITED_AT, LAST_VISITED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES( SEQ_SITE_VISIT_LOG.NEXTVAL, TO_DATE(#{visitDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{visitorType}, #{visitorKey}, #{memberId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{sessionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{visitedUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_TIMESTAMP( #{firstVisitedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ), TO_TIMESTAMP( #{lastVisitedAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ), SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
